name: Cheesecake - Ioannidis
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 190°C. Use the steel blade of the food processor; drop the zwieback cookies into the processor one at a time and process until fine. Add the sugar and cinnamon. Melt the butter and pour it in. Process for 2 seconds or until crumbs are moistened. Reserve 3/4 cup of crumbs. Press the remaining crumbs into the bottom and sides of a buttered 25 cm springform pan. Bake for 10 minutes, then refrigerate for 30 minutes.
2. Preheat oven to 175°C. Cut the cream cheese into 30 g pieces. Process with the steel blade until smooth. In another bowl, beat the egg whites until stiff. Blend the sugar into the egg whites and pour into the processor bowl. Process with the cream cheese until smooth. Add vanilla. Process for 2 seconds. Pour the mixture into the crust and bake for 25 minutes.
3. Preheat oven to 250°C. Mix together the sour cream, sugar, and vanilla. Spread over the top of the cake. Sprinkle the reserved crumbs to cover the topping. Arrange slivered almonds over the crumbs. Bake for 7 minutes.
4. Refrigerate overnight. The next morning, open the springform pan and knock off excess crust.
Note: This recipe is reputedly the winner of the 1980 A&S Cheesecake contest. Enjoy your cheesecake!
